ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisations" (
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organisation */,
  "organisation_name" TEXT /* Name of the organisation */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of organisation (e.g., Red Cross / Red Crescent) */,
  "acronym" TEXT /* Acronym of the organisation */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the main website */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the organisation was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the organisation's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Main contact email */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Main contact phone number */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Array of social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the branch belongs to */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of branch (e.g., National Headquarters, Division) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the branch operates */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the branch */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the branch's website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Array of social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_branches_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_branches" (
  "sub_branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-branch */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the sub-branch belongs to */,
  "sub_branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-branch */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of sub-branch (e.g., Region, Area) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sub-branch */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the sub-branch's website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Array of social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_branches_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_sub_branches" (
  "sub_sub_branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-sub-branch */,
  "sub_branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-branch the sub-sub-branch belongs to */,
  "sub_sub_branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-sub-branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sub-sub-branch */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the sub-sub-branch's website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Array of social media handles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_sub_branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sub_sub_branches_sub_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_branch_id") REFERENCES sub_branches ("sub_branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "head_office_location" TEXT /* Location of the head office in the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Main contact email for the region */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Main contact email for the country */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the website belongs to */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the website belongs to */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media handle */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the social media handle belongs to */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the social media handle belongs to */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle of the social media account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, program manager, volunteer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the platform */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the report belongs to */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., activity report, financial report) */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data */,
  "organisation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organisation the analytics data belongs to */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch the analytics data belongs to */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date when the analytics data was generated */,
  "analytics_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics data (e.g., website traffic, social media engagement) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analytics data (e.g., pending, complete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_organisation_id FOREIGN KEY ("organisation_id") REFERENCES organisations ("organisation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., report generated, analytics updated) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
